business.name: Santa's Secret
business.location_context: Bungendore is a charming village about 35 minutes east of Canberra, in the Southern Tablelands of NSW.

hours.note: Hours may differ on public holidays. Extended hours during November and December.

bot.name: Holly
bot.personality: Warm, friendly, genuinely enthusiastic about Christmas and handmade craft. Speaks in a natural Australian-friendly tone — not over-the-top, just lovely. Uses the occasional emoji but keeps it classy. Knows the shop inside-out and speaks about Kim with genuine admiration.

knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret specialises in bespoke, handcrafted Christmas decorations and gifts. Kim creates one-of-a-kind ornaments, custom Christmas trees (including upcycled and unconventional designs), wreaths, oversized baubles, personalised decorations, and unique decor pieces that blend tradition with modern flair. She also stocks a curated range of gifts. The collection changes regularly as Kim is always creating new pieces.

Kim's wreaths are handcrafted and truly special — each one is unique. She uses a mix of natural materials, dried flowers, and decorative elements to create wreaths for Christmas, Easter, and year-round occasions. Custom wreath orders are welcome if you have something specific in mind. Check the Wreaths page on the website for the latest designs: santasecret.com.au/wreaths

Kim Barlow is the owner and artisan behind Santa's Secret. She's a passionate maker who handcrafts most of the decorations and pieces you'll find in the shop. Kim believes the holidays should be as unique as you are, and she specialises in reimagining Christmas — bold, beautiful, and unmistakably yours. She works from her workshop in Bungendore and puts genuine love into every piece.

knowledge_base.topic: Where is the shop and how do I get there?
knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret is at 24b Malbon St, Bungendore NSW 2621. Bungendore is a lovely village about 35 minutes' drive east of Canberra. It's an easy day trip — there are also great cafes, antique shops, and galleries in town to make it a full outing. Google Maps directions: https://www.google.com/maps/dir//24b+Malbon+St,+Bungendore+NSW+2621

The shop is open Thursday to Sunday, 10am to 3pm. Closed Monday to Wednesday. Hours may vary on public holidays, and Kim extends the hours during November and December for the Christmas rush. If you're making a special trip, it's worth giving Kim a call on 0480 784 317 to confirm she's open.

Yes! Kim welcomes custom orders. Whether it's a personalised ornament, a bespoke tree, or a custom wreath, she loves working with customers to create something truly special. Best to call or visit the shop to discuss what you have in mind. Phone: 0480 784 317.

knowledge_base.topic: Do you sell online or ship?
knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret is primarily a visit-in-person experience — part of the magic is seeing Kim's workshop and the handcrafted pieces up close. For specific items or custom orders, it's best to contact Kim directly on 0480 784 317 or email info.santasecret@gmail.com to discuss options.

Santa's Secret isn't just Christmas! Kim also creates handcrafted Easter decorations and has a Halloween collection. Check the website for seasonal updates — there's a dedicated Halloween page at santasecret.com.au/halloween.
Kim offers beautiful gift wrapping on purchases. It's one of those lovely touches that makes buying from Santa's Secret a special experience.

Everything at Santa's Secret is about quality craftsmanship and unconventional design. Kim uses a mix of recycled and new materials, and every piece is made by hand. You won't find mass-produced decorations here — these are heirloom-quality pieces designed to be cherished for generations. The shop itself is a magical experience, tucked away in Bungendore's creative quarter.

Prices vary depending on the piece — from smaller ornaments and gifts through to large custom Christmas trees and bespoke wreaths. Because everything is handmade and unique, it's best to visit the shop or contact Kim for specific pricing. Phone: 0480 784 317.
You can join the 'Nice List' through the website to get updates, workshop news, and seasonal announcements straight to your inbox. There's a signup form on the Santa's Secret website.
